name: Fatima Qureshi
bio:
My name is Fatima Qureshi, and I have completed my Bachelor’s in Islamic Studies. I have also studied Taleem-ul-Quran from Alhuda and am continuing my learning of Deen.
For the past two years, I have been teaching children, helping them learn the Quran from Qaida to proper recitation with Tajweed. I focus on correct pronunciation while keeping my teaching style patient and supportive.
My goal is to help students feel confident and develop a love for the Quran, InshaAllah 🤍
experience: 2 Years – Teaching Quran to Children (Home-Based & Online)
featuredQuote: Helping children fall in love with the Quran🤍
